parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "report_id": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.report_id }}",
  "company_name": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.company_name }}",
  "attack_id": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.attack_id }}",
  "attack_name": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.attack_name }}",
  "mitre_id": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.mitre_id }}",
  "risk_level": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.risk_level }}",
  "description": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.description }}",
  "command_executed": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.command }}",
  "parameters": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.parameters) }},
  "ssh_output": "{{ $('SSH — Ejecutar ataque en Kali').first().json.stdout }}",
  "ssh_exit_code": {{ $('SSH — Ejecutar ataque en Kali').first().json.exitCode }},
  "logger_output": "{{ $('SSH — Logger Wazuh').first().json.stdout }}",
  "start_timestamp": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.start_timestamp }}",
  "end_timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "wazuh_rule_id": {{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.wazuh_rule_id }}
}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "attack_id": "{{ $('Code — Construir comandos').first().json.attack_id }}",

}
